name: global-jobs-international
description: Global Jobs International — full-stack international job platform

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.build:client:production: node scripts/create-client-env-production.mjs && npm run build -w client && node scripts/verify-production-deploy.mjs --local-only
